# Feature Spec: [Feature Name]

## Summary

Describe the feature in one or two paragraphs.

## Player Value

Why does this matter to the player?

## Scope

Included:

- item 1
- item 2

Excluded:

- item 1
- item 2

## Game Design

Describe how the feature works from the player's perspective.

## Rules

List exact rules.

## UI/UX

Describe required UI, feedback, warnings, overlays, and tooltips.

## Data Model

Describe new or changed data structures.

## Technical Design

Describe implementation approach and affected modules.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Tests

- [ ] Unit test 1
- [ ] Unit test 2
- [ ] Integration test if needed

## Risks

List risks and mitigations.
